data.title: Adaptive function value warping for surrogate model assisted evolutionary optimization
data.book: International Conference on Parallel Problem Solving from Nature
data.description: Surrogate modelling techniques have the potential to reduce the number of objective function evaluations needed to solve black-box optimization problems. Most surrogate modelling techniques in use with evolutionary algorithms today do not preserve the desirable invariance to order-preserving transformations of objective function values of the underlying algorithms. We propose adaptive function value warping as a tool aiming to reduce the sensitivity of algorithm behaviour to such transformations.
